Festival.example: The Water Splashing Festival in Xishuangbanna brings joy to every family.
Festival.exampleCn: 西双版纳的泼水节给每个家庭带来欢乐。

speaking.example: Daily speaking practice helps me express my ideas clearly.
speaking.exampleCn: 日常口语练习帮助我清晰地表达自己的想法。

modal.example: Can and must are common modal verbs in English grammar.
modal.exampleCn: Can 和 must 是英语语法中常见的情态动词。

textbook.example: My textbook teaches me not only English but also different cultures.
textbook.exampleCn: 我的课本不仅教我英语，还教我不同的文化。

pronunciation.example: Good pronunciation makes communication between friends much easier.
pronunciation.exampleCn: 良好的发音让朋友之间的交流变得容易得多。

expression.example: A warm smile is the most beautiful expression of friendship.
expression.exampleCn: 温暖的微笑是友谊最美丽的表达。

grammar.example: Understanding grammar helps us build sentences like building blocks.
grammar.exampleCn: 理解语法帮助我们像搭积木一样构建句子。

pal.example: My pal and I often hike together in the mountains near Kunming.
pal.exampleCn: 我和我的伙伴经常一起徒步昆明附近的山脉。

chemistry.example: Chemistry explains why flowers smell so sweet in spring.
chemistry.exampleCn: 化学解释了为什么春天的花儿闻起来如此香甜。

increase.example: Reading every day can increase your vocabulary quickly.
increase.exampleCn: 每天阅读可以快速增加你的词汇量。

born.example: Every person is born with a unique gift waiting to be discovered.
born.exampleCn: 每个人生来就有一种等待被发现的独特天赋。

brain.example: Reading books is like giving your brain healthy food every day.
brain.exampleCn: 读书就像每天给你的大脑提供健康的食物。

connect.example: The Internet helps us connect with friends across the world.
connect.exampleCn: 互联网帮助我们与世界各地的朋友联系。

lifelong.example: Lifelong learning is the key to a meaningful life.
lifelong.exampleCn: 终身学习是拥有有意义生活的关键。

conversation.example: A heart-to-heart conversation can solve many misunderstandings.
conversation.exampleCn: 一次推心置腹的交谈可以解决许多误解。

aloud.example: Reading aloud every morning improves both memory and confidence.
aloud.exampleCn: 每天早上大声朗读可以提高记忆力和自信心。

patient.example: Be patient with yourself when learning something new.
patient.exampleCn: 学习新东西时要对自己有耐心。

discover.example: I discovered a hidden waterfall during my hike in Yunnan.
discover.exampleCn: 我在云南徒步时发现了一处隐藏的瀑布。

secret.example: The secret to true friendship is honest communication.
secret.exampleCn: 真正友谊的秘诀是诚实的交流。

repeat.example: Repeat new words five times, and they will stay in your memory.
repeat.exampleCn: 把新单词重复五遍，它们就会留在你的记忆中。

note.example: Taking good notes in class helps you review efficiently.
note.exampleCn: 课堂上做好笔记帮助你高效复习。

physics.example: Physics explains why the sky looks blue on clear days.
physics.exampleCn: 物理学解释了为什么晴天时天空看起来是蓝色的。

memorize.example: I use songs to memorize new English words more easily.
memorize.exampleCn: 我用歌曲来更轻松地记住新的英语单词。

speed.example: Riding a bike lets you enjoy the scenery at the right speed.
speed.exampleCn: 骑自行车让你以合适的速度欣赏风景。

partner.example: A good study partner makes difficult subjects feel easier.
partner.exampleCn: 一个好的学习搭档让困难的科目变得简单。

ability.example: Everyone has the ability to learn a foreign language well.
ability.exampleCn: 每个人都有学好一门外语的能力。

create.example: We should create art that reflects our love for nature.
create.exampleCn: 我们应该创作反映我们对自然之爱的艺术。

active.example: Staying active outdoors keeps both body and mind healthy.
active.exampleCn: 在户外保持活跃让身心都保持健康。
